title: Analytics - Find My Device Sound Played
scenario: Analytics event logged when sound is played from the Find My Device screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the Find My Device option.
On the Find My Device screen, trigger a sound to play on the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
expected: The app logs analytics events when sound is played from the Find My Device screen. The logged data includes event count by country, gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
